qa_pairs.question: How do faculty members renew their Alliance accounts?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members will receive an email during the account renewal period with a link to the account renewal form on the CCDB. They need to update their contact information, Field of Research, fill out a User Satisfaction Survey, and update the status of their sponsored roles. Finally, they must click the 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' button to initiate the request.

qa_pairs.question: What information must faculty update when renewing their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members must update their contact information, Field of Research, complete a User Satisfaction Survey, and update the status of any sponsored roles they oversee (e.g., students, postdocs).

qa_pairs.question: What is the process for faculty to update the status of sponsored users' accounts during renewal?
qa_pairs.answer: University faculty who have sponsored other users will be asked to update the status of these accounts, indicating whether the sponsored users are continuing or if their work is done and the sponsorship has ended. They should refer to Question 1.7 if roles have changed.

qa_pairs.question: What is the final step for a faculty member to initiate their account renewal request?
qa_pairs.answer: After updating and confirming all information, including the status of sponsored users, the faculty member must click the 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' button on the left side of the account renewals form to initiate the renewal request.

qa_pairs.question: If a Principal Investigator (PI) with a faculty role moves to a new institution, will their sponsored users automatically transfer to their new role?
qa_pairs.answer: No, if a PI with a faculty role moves to a different institution, any user they wish to sponsor with their new faculty role will have to apply for a new role sponsored by that new faculty position.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to a sponsored user's access to Resource Allocation Project (RAP) resources if their PI moves institutions and the user's old role is not transferred?
qa_pairs.answer: If a PI has a RAC allocation and moves institutions, users sponsored with their old role will lose access to the Resource Allocation Project (RAP) where those resources are allocated.

qa_pairs.question: How can a PI add sponsored users to their Resource Allocation Project (RAP) after the users get new roles activated?
qa_pairs.answer: Once sponsored users get their new roles activated, the PI may have to add them to their RAP. This can be done by going to 'My Projects' → 'Manage Project Membership' on CCDB.

qa_pairs.question: Can a PI access the files of a sponsored user who has moved on and is no longer under their sponsorship?
qa_pairs.answer: Consent from that user may be required for the PI to access the files. It is important to make arrangements with the sponsored user as soon as possible to mitigate the risk of them becoming incommunicado.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more information about accessing files of users who are no longer part of a project?
qa_pairs.answer: More information about accessing files of users leaving a project can be found by consulting the [https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Access_to_files_of_users_leaving_a_project page].

qa_pairs.question: What is the process for users with sponsored roles (e.g., Doctoral, Masters, External Collaborator) to renew their accounts?
qa_pairs.answer: Users with sponsored roles will receive an email during the account renewal period with a link to the account renewal form. They need to update their contact information, complete the form, fill out a User Satisfaction Survey, and click the 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' button.

qa_pairs.question: What should a sponsored user do if their sponsor has marked them as continuing?
qa_pairs.answer: If a sponsor has marked a user as continuing, the user may renew their account. They will receive an email directing them to the renewal form, where they must update information, complete a survey, and click 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL'. The account will be renewed immediately or once their sponsor renews their own account.

qa_pairs.question: What should a sponsored user do if their sponsor indicates they have moved on, graduated, or changed positions?
qa_pairs.answer: If a sponsor indicates a user has moved on, graduated, or changed positions, that particular role cannot be renewed. Instead, the user must apply for a new role that reflects their current circumstances (e.g., new sponsor, institution, position).

qa_pairs.question: Why might a sponsored role remain deactivated even after the user has completed their account renewal on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: If a sponsored role remains deactivated after the user has completed renewal on CCDB, it is because their sponsor has not yet renewed or reactivated their own account.

qa_pairs.question: When will a sponsored role be activated after the sponsored user has renewed it?
qa_pairs.answer: A sponsored role should be activated as soon as the sponsor renews their account and confirms the sponsored user's role. Activation only occurs once the sponsor confirms the role is continuing AND renews their own account.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if my sponsored role is still deactivated after I've renewed it on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: If your sponsored role is still deactivated after renewal, you should email renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I mistakenly renewed my Alliance account with the wrong role?
qa_pairs.answer: If you renewed your account with the wrong role, you should create a new role with your current information and update your account with it. Log into CCDB, go to 'My Account' → 'Apply for a new role', and follow the instructions.

qa_pairs.question: How do I apply for a new, correct role on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: To apply for a new, correct role, log into CCDB, navigate to the main menu, under 'My Account', and select 'Apply for a new role'. Follow the instructions to select your new role.

qa_pairs.question: What happens after I submit an application for a new role on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: After you submit an application for a new role, your sponsor will receive an email with a link to a page where they can confirm this new role.

qa_pairs.question: When will an old role automatically expire and be deactivated if it is not renewed?
qa_pairs.answer: An old role will automatically expire and be deactivated on the morning of June 11, 2025, if it is not renewed.
